$comment: Codex CLI hook config. Loaded automatically when the project root contains .codex/hooks.json (codex-cli >= 0.121). For earlier codex-cli, copy this content into ~/.codex/hooks.json or reference these paths from a Codex plugin manifest. Hook event names and the wire shape (`hookEventName`, `additionalContext`, `hookSpecificOutput`) are identical to Claude Code's. Commands are wrapped in `bash -c` with a CODEX_PROJECT_DIR -> CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR -> $PWD fallback because Codex Desktop (codex-cli 0.125.x bundled in /Applications/Codex.app) does not propagate CODEX_PROJECT_DIR to hook subprocesses, which collapses the unwrapped path to /.codex/... and yields exit 127.
